name: @platform/runtime-renderer
description: Server-safe renderer for Studio draft sections. Pure React (no client-only hooks) that turns a DraftDocument or PublishedProduct snapshot into JSX. Consumed by apps/studio (preview + /p/[slug]) in M11 and by apps/fanaa in M12+ when the operator opts in. Mobile-first; lazy media; CLS-safe; no external CSS dependency (uses inline styles + scoped class names).
